3277340.name: BrickLike Demo
3277340.description:
A refreshing twist on an old classic, mixing arcade gameplay with the roguelike genre.

Test your skill, break bricks, make combos, turns balls aflame and electrify bosses in this frenetic experience!

This Demo contains a shortened version of the first level, to try out the first 10 minutes of the game! As the game expands, the demo will also have more content.

Features

- Procedurally generated maps

- Many ball modifiers with over 15 different combinations

- Unique Bosses (1 in the Demo)

- A wide range of Upgrades with many synergies
